propositions: Completion-verifier FAIL verdicts are not persisted durably, so only PASS verdicts leave a signed attestation and FAILs vanish.
FAIL verdicts should be persisted as a reducer-ignored sidecar event in the ticket store keyed to the ticket, mirroring the plan-review REVIEW_RESULT pattern.
The persisted record must carry schema='completion_verifier_fail_v1' plus verdict, findings with criterion/detail/remediation, certifiable flag, model/runner, timestamp, and material fingerprint.
Persistence must be best-effort inside try/except before the FAIL is raised so a write failure does not mask or alter the fail-closed behavior.
A test must drive a mocked FAIL through the close path and assert the record exists with expected schema, criteria, and remediation fields.
A test must exercise the persistence-failure branch, mocking the sidecar write to raise, and assert the close still blocks with the FAIL unchanged.
